## Problem

What user pain or product gap does this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature. If it touches discovery layers (Server / State / County / ZIP),
chat smart-replies, verification, or notifications, call that out.

## Surface

- [ ] Android phone
- [ ] Wear OS
- [ ] Backend / Supabase
- [ ] Shared `:core`
- [ ] Cross-platform (also Apple)

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed.

## Additional context

Mocks, links, or related issues.
